headline: Businesses are experimenting with cheaper Chinese AI models as U.S. rivals get more expensive
summary: Lower costs and open-source availability are prompting some companies to experiment with Chinese AI models, even as security concerns remain.

headline: DoorDash Earnings Preview: What to Expect
summary: DoorDash is expected to announce its second-quarter earnings in August, and Wall Street forecasts a double-digit decrease in its bottom line.
